name: sunset-grid
description: JEPA-powered room grid. Each room runs an MLP forward pass, novelty scoring, and chaos dynamics. Rooms fire when their latent exceeds a threshold, driving the routing layer.

skills.name: Room Forward Pass
skills.description: Drive the grid forward by one step: compute latents for all rooms, apply novelty/chaos gating, return fired rooms
examples: Tick the grid with a 64-dim signal and return fired room IDs

skills.name: Routing
skills.description: Route signals between rooms based on learned routing weights and firing thresholds
examples: Route signal from room 7 to all rooms with routing strength > 0.8

skills.name: Novelty Scoring
skills.description: Compute per-room novelty scores against a surprise buffer and return anomaly rankings
examples: Rank rooms by novelty score over the last 100 ticks

skills.name: Rebirth Room
skills.description: Reset a room's weights and chaos to initial values, effectively rebirthing it

skills.name: Grid Activity Summary
skills.description: Return activity summary: firing rates, chaos levels, novelty distributions, and compile-status
examples: Get activity summary for rooms 0-31 over the last 100 ticks
